# Diagram: research/orchestrator/util/is_spark_up.sh

## Diagram 1

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start([Start]) --> GetDir[Get script directory<br/>SCRIPT_DIR]
    GetDir --> SetEnv[Set PYTHONSTARTUP env variable]
    SetEnv --> RunPyspark[Run pyspark --master yarn<br/>with 60s timeout]
    RunPyspark --> CheckExit{Exit code = 0?}
    CheckExit -->|Yes| EchoUp[Echo 'Spark is UP']
    CheckExit -->|No| EchoDown[Echo 'Spark is DOWN']
    EchoUp --> Exit0([Exit 0])
    EchoDown --> Exit1([Exit 1])
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Script
    participant ENV as Environment
    participant Timeout
    participant Pyspark
    
    Script->>Script: Get SCRIPT_DIR
    Script->>ENV: Set PYTHONSTARTUP variable
    Script->>Timeout: Start 60s timeout
    Timeout->>Pyspark: Execute pyspark --master yarn
    alt Command succeeds within 60s
        Pyspark-->>Timeout: Exit code 0
        Timeout-->>Script: Exit code 0
        Script->>Script: Echo "Spark is UP"
        Script->>Script: Exit 0
    else Command fails or times out
        Pyspark-->>Timeout: Non-zero exit code
        Timeout-->>Script: Non-zero exit code
        Script->>Script: Echo "Spark is DOWN"
        Script->>Script: Exit 1
    end
```
